text.title: gitops-flux Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gitops-flux as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Enabling ImageUpdateAutomation with auto-commit and auto-merge for production environments.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Automated image bumps in production bypass human review; a bad image can be deployed before anyone notices. Auto-update is safe for dev; prod should go through a PR with human approval.
